title: agrostis coarctata subsp. trinii
intro: Agrostis coarctata subsp. trinii, also known as Redtop, is a type of grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is often used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The health benefits of Agrostis coarctata subsp. trinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Agrostis coarctata subsp. trinii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
